name: 1N4148WS (SOD-323)
designNotes: Smaller than SOD-123 -- better for compact low-profile keyboard PCBs
Fits under Choc switch bodies when placed between pins
Harder to hand-solder than SOD-123 due to smaller pad size
75V reverse voltage (vs 100V on SOD-123) -- irrelevant for keyboard use
Preferred for JLCPCB assembly due to LCSC availability and low cost
summary: Compact keyboard matrix diode in SOD-323 package — fits under Choc switches
features: Ultra-compact SOD-323 package saves board space
Fits under Kailh Choc switch bodies
75V reverse voltage — ample for keyboard use
Same electrical specs as SOD-123 variant
Preferred for JLCPCB assembly due to LCSC availability
concerns: Harder to hand-solder than SOD-123 due to smaller pads
Requires magnification for manual placement and inspection
Slightly lower reverse voltage (75V vs 100V) — irrelevant for keyboards
